# Med-Minder Product Scope

## MVP Problem
Caregivers struggle to track exact medication timing, especially when:
- intervals are unusual
- medications are PRN
- a taper plan changes the interval over time
- multiple people are involved in caregiving
- the caregiver needs a quick answer under stress

## MVP Features
- Create one or more patients
- Add medications
- Support schedule types:
  - interval
  - fixed times
  - PRN with minimum interval
  - taper
- Log doses
- Show:
  - last given
  - next eligible time
  - whether eligible now
  - due soon / overdue state
- Optional early reminder
- Dose history

## Nice-to-Have After MVP
- caregiver initials / given-by field
- timeline view
- missed dose handling
- export printable medication summary
- notes per medication
- multiple device sync
- attachment/photo support for prescription labels

## Explicitly Deferred
- diagnosis
- treatment recommendations
- interaction engine
- pharmacy integrations
- insurance features
- provider messaging
